5. tRRD_L/S depend on page size (2KB/1KB/1/2KB); values shown are for 2KB page at DDR4-1600
7. Read-to-Write formula = RL+BL/2-WL+2 (1tCK write preamble); +3 for 2tCK write preamble
8. N/A = command illegal in that state per DDR4 state machine (§3.1)
9. tXP=max(4nCK,6ns). Exit Precharge PD with DLL frozen: same tXP; if DLL off mode required: tXSDLL=tDLLK
10. Write CRC enabled: add max(4nCK,3.75ns) to tWR and tWTR (tWR_CRC_DM and tWTR_x_CRC_DM)
